title: The Weekly Challenge - 178
task1_desc: Write a script to convert a given number (base 10) to quater-imaginary base number and vice-versa. For more informations, please checkout [**wiki page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quater-imaginary_base).
task1_body: Write a script to convert a given number (base 10) to quater-imaginary base number and vice-versa. For more informations, please checkout [**wiki page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quater-imaginary_base). For example, $number_base_10 = 4 $number_quater_imaginary_base = 10300
task2_desc: You are given `$timestamp` (date with time) and `$duration` in hours.
task2_body:
You are given `$timestamp` (date with time) and `$duration` in hours. Write a script to find the time that occurs `$duration` business hours after `$timestamp`. For the sake of this task, let us assume the working hours is 9am to 6pm, Monday to Friday. Please ignore timezone too. For example, Suppose the given timestamp is 2022-08-01 10:30 and the duration is 4 hours. Then the next business date would be 2022-08-01 14:30. Similar if the given timestamp is 2022-08-01 17:00 and the duration is 3.5 hours. Then the next business date would be 2022-08-02 11:30.
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 21st August 2022**.
